mapper.select: select id, cname, create_date, website, reg_number, csize, capital, business, crowd, source_n, source_w, update_time from p_company where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into p_company (cname, create_date, website, reg_number, csize, capital, business, crowd, source_n, source_w, update_time) values (#{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{website,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{csize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{capital,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{crowd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceW,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update:
update p_company
cname = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
website = #{website,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reg_number = #{regNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
csize = #{csize,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
capital = #{capital,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
business = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
crowd = #{crowd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_n = #{sourceN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
source_w = #{sourceW,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update p_company set cname = #{cname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_date = #{createDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, website = #{website,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reg_number = #{regNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, csize = #{csize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, capital = #{capital,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, business = #{business,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, crowd = #{crowd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_n = #{sourceN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, source_w = #{sourceW,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
